steps.title: Spot the causal setup
steps.content: The passage explains that Bradley and Cooper adapted a specific practice; the follow-up sentence reveals what this adaptation enabled. A transition showing cause-and-effect is required.

steps.title: Apply the cause-effect transition
steps.content: ”In this way,” connects their adaptation to what it made possible—expressing their joint creative vision. The other three introduce examples, establish a timeline, or signal contrast rather than causation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
